source_filing: Johnson & Johnson Form 10-K (fiscal year ended December 28, 2025)
original_text: In 2025, worldwide sales increased 6.0% to $94.2 billion as compared to an increase of 4.3% in 2024.
modified_text: In fiscal 2023, worldwide sales increased 6.0% to $94.2 billion, compared with an increase of 4.3% the prior year.
claim: In fiscal 2023, Johnson & Johnson's worldwide sales increased 6.0% to $94.2 billion.
citation_as_written: Johnson & Johnson Form 10-K, fiscal year ended December 28, 2025, MD&A
notes: Figures (6.0%, $94.2 billion, 4.3%) are faithful to the source, but the source attributes them to fiscal 2025; the modified text wrongly assigns the result to fiscal 2023. The citation still points to the real 2025 10-K, so the embedded fiscal-year attribute contradicts the cited document.
